Select crSigMvCcr
If Not IsEmpty(crAltcc.Datas)
	Set Near On
	Seek _Empr + Dtos(crAltcc.Datas)
	Set Near Off
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************

ThisForm.m_Inserir

If ThisForm.podatamgr.Update('Craltcc')
	If Not fRecalculaS( .t., ThisForm.Podatamgr )
		MessageBox('Favor reinicializar o processo.',16,'Falha na Conexăo - SigOpCls')
		ThisForm.podatamgr.RollBack()
	Else
		ThisForm.podatamgr.Commit()
	Endif
Else
	MessageBox('Favor reinicializar o processo.',16,'Falha na Conexăo')
	ThisForm.podatamgr.RollBack()
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************

Private pEmp, pNop, pDat

Select crSigMvCcr
pEmp = crSigMvCcr.Emps
pNop = crSigMvCcr.Nopers
pDat = ThisForm.poDataMgr.GetDatetime()
	
lcUpdate = [Update SigMvCcr ] + ;
			  [Set DatExcs = ?pDat, UsuExcs = '] + Usuar + [' ] + ;
		    [Where Emps = '] + pEmp + [' And NOpers = ] + Str(pNop)

lnErro1 = ThisForm.podatamgr.SqlExecute(lcUpdate,'')
lnClassErr = 0
If lnErro1 > 0
	lcDelete = [Delete From SigMvCcr Where Emps = '] + pEmp + [' And NOpers = ] + Str(pNop)

	lnClassErr = ThisForm.podatamgr.SqlE... [TRUNCADO]

Private pEmp, pNop, pDat

ThisForm.m_inserir

Select CrSigMvCcr
pEmp = Emps
pNop = Nopers
pDat = ThisForm.PodataMgr.GetDatetime()
	
lcUpdate = [Update SigMvCcr Set DatExcs = ?pDat, UsuExcs = '] + Usuar + [' ] + ;
			[Where Emps = '] + pEmp + [' And Nopers = ] + Str(pNop)

lnErro1 = ThisForm.podatamgr.SqlExecute(lcUpdate,'')
lnClassErr = 0
If lnErro1 > 0
	lcDelete = [Delete From SigMvCcr Where Emps = '] + pEmp + [' And Nopers = ] + Str(pNop)
	
	lnClassErr = ThisForm.podatamgr.SqlExecute(lcDelete,... [TRUNCADO]

Lparameters _Acesso, pnVal

Private lcCliente, pEmp, pNoper, PGrupo, pConta, pMoeda

pEmp   = _Empr
pNoper = 9999999
lcCliente = Space(10)
pGrupo = Space(10)
pConta = Space(10)
pMoeda = Space(03)

With ThisForm
	.podatamgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector','SigMvCcr')

	.nValor = Iif(Type([pnVal])=[L], 0, pnVal)
	
	pData = .PodataMgr.GetDatetime()

	If Ttod(pData) <> Date()
		=MessageBox('A Data do Micro năo confere com Data do Servidor.'+Chr(13)+;
					'Registrando ocorrencia Usuário: '+Usuar,0,'',... [TRUNCADO]

Lparameters nColIndex

Local lcEmpr, lcDope, lnNume, lnNumc, lnVoper, lnNoper
Private lcDopc

_MAnexa = .f.

lcEmpr = crSigMvCcr.Emps
lcDope = crSigMvCcr.Dopes
lnNume = crSigMvCcr.Numes
lcDopc = crSigMvCcr.Dopcs
lnNumc = crSigMvCcr.Numcs
lnVoper= crSigMvCcr.VOpers
lnOper = crSigMvCcr.Nopers
lcEmpo = Left( CrSigMvCcr.VOpers, 3 ) 
lcvope = Val(Padl( Alltrim( Substr( crSigMvCcr.Vopers, 4 ) ), 7 ))

lcQuery = [Select NDopes, RealPrevs ] + ;
		    [From SigOpOpe ] + ;
		   [Where Dopes = '] + lcDopc ... [TRUNCADO]

LPARAMETERS opcao

Select CrSigCdPam
Go Top

If !dodefault( Opcao )
	ThisForm.mAtivapagina1
	Return
Endif

Select crSigMvCcr
If Eof([crSigMvCcr]) And (ThisForm.pcEscolha <> [INSERIR])
	ThisForm.mAtivaPagina1
	Return .f.
EndIf

pEmp   = crSigMvCcr.Emps
pNoper = crSigMvCcr.Nopers
lcOpe  = crSigMvCcr.Opers
ThisForm.poDataMgr.Requery([crAltCC])

ok=.t.
okdt=.t.
Thisform.lockscreen = .t.

If Inlist( ThisForm.pcEscolha, 'ALTERAR', 'EXCLUIR' )
	Select CrAltcc
	Scan
		=fRecalculaS( Craltcc.Grupos, CrAlt... [TRUNCADO]

Local lcEmps, ldDatas, lcTransacao
Private lnNopers

IF thisform.nvalor <> 0
	grupoOri = ThisForm.Pagina.Dados.Get_grupo.Value
	contaOri = Thisform.Pagina.Dados.Get_Conta.Value
	Thisform.Podatamgr.Sqlexecute([select contas from SigOpCls where contas = ?contaori and grupos = ?grupoori and moedas = 'R'],'Tmpcalcs')
	IF RECCOUNT('tmpcalcs') >= 1
		MESSAGEBOX('A conta selecionada tem pendęncias de recálculo.',64,'Aviso')
		RETURN .f.
	ENDIF
ENDIF 

Select CrAltcc
Go Top
lcEmps  = Craltcc.Emps
ldData... [TRUNCADO]

N_NOPER = craltcc.NOPERS
dat=Nvl(craltcc.datas,Ctod(Space(08)))

DoDefault()

If ThisForm.plCancelar
	If ThisForm.pcEscolha = 'INSERIR'
		=fCanUniqueKey( N_NOper, 'SigMvCcr' )
	Endif
	select CrSigMvCcr
	If ThisForm.pcEscolha='INSERIR'
		goto bottom
	ENDIF
	IF thisform.nvalor = 0
		ThisForm.mAtivapagina1
	ELSE
		thisform.Release()
	ENDIF
Endif

Local lcEmpr, lcDope, lnNume, lnNumc, lnVoper, lnOper, lcEmpo, lcVope
Local laCampo1(3,2), laCampo2(2,2), laCampo3(2,2), laCampo4(2,2)

laCampo1(1,1) = 'Emps'
laCampo1(1,2) = lcEmpr

If ThisForm.pcEscolha # 'PROCURAR' And fBloqueioPorPeriodo( This.Value, ThisForm.podatamgr ) # 0
	Messagebox( 'Periodo Bloqueado !!!',0+48,'')
	This.Value = ThisForm.OldData
	Return 0
EndIf

ThisForm.Ultdata = This.Value

If IsEmpty( craltcc.Vencs )
	Replace craltcc.Vencs with craltcc.Datas in CrAltcc
	ThisFor... [TRUNCADO]
RETURN ((INLIST(ThisForm.pcEscolha,'INSERIR','ALTERAR') AND thisform.nvalor = 0) OR (ThisForm.pcEscolha=='PROCURAR'.And.This.plProcurar))
RETURN ((INLIST(ThisForm.pcEscolha,'INSERIR','ALTERAR') AND thisform.nvalor = 0) OR (ThisForm.pcEscolha=='PROCURAR'.And.This.plProcurar))

Grupo = ''
If Not Empty(This.Value)
	If Not fAcessoContas(Usuar, Grupo, 'C', This.Value, ThisForm.Pagina.Dados.getjob, ThisForm.Pagina.Dados.getdjob, .f., .f. ,.f.,.f.,.f.,.f.,.f.,10)
		=Messagebox('Acesso Negado!!!', 0+48, '')
		This.Value = ''
		ThisForm.Pagina.Dados.getdjob.Value = ''
		Return .f.
	EndIf
Else
	ThisForm.Pagina.Dados.getdjob.Value = ''
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************
Return ( Inlist(Thisform.pcEscolha,'INSERIR','ALTERAR') And IsEmpty( Thisform.Pagina.Dados.getjob.Value ))

Grupo = ''
If Not Empty(This.Value)
	If Not fAcessoContas(Usuar, Grupo, 'D', This.Value, ThisForm.Pagina.Dados.getjob, ThisForm.Pagina.Dados.getdjob, .f., .f. ,.f.,.f.,.f.,.f.,.f.,10)
		=Messagebox('Acesso Negado!!!', 0+48, '')
		This.Value = ''
		ThisForm.Pagina.Dados.getjob.Value = ''
		Return .f.
	EndIf
Else
	ThisForm.Pagina.Dados.getjob.Value = ''
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************
